title: When I Feel Excited
subtitle: Tanuki helps you slow down happy energy.

steps.text: Stand or sit tall and wiggle your fingers fast.
steps.hint: Feel all that excited energy in your hands.

steps.text: Say quietly: “I feel excited right now.”
Imagine Tanuki holding a big soft bubble in front of you.
steps.hint: Your job is to breathe slowly so the bubble doesn’t pop.

steps.text: Take three slow breaths with Tanuki, keeping the bubble floating.
steps.hint: In… and out… slowing your body just a little.
